items.name: 前川善兵衛寄進の石仏
items.description: 四代目前川善兵衛（富昌）が海蔵院に寄進した石仏（薬師如来・不動明王）。

en.name_en: Stone Buddha Donated by Maekawa Zenbee
en.description_en: This is a tangible cultural property, a stone Buddha image donated by Maekawa Zenbee. It is village-designated by Noda Village and was designated on 24 May 1976. It is located in Noda Village.

items.name: 神明様神木ヒバ
items.category: 記念物(史跡・名勝・天然記念物)
items.subcategory: 村史跡名勝天然記念物
items.description: 樹齢約300年の大木（学名サワラ）。天照大神を祀る神木。

en.description_en: This is a village-designated historic site, scenic beauty and natural monument, the sacred hiba (false cypress) tree. It is designated by Noda Village and was designated on 17 March 1978. It is located at Monzen-koji, Noda Village.

items.name: チョウセンアカシジミ
items.category: 記念物(史跡・名勝・天然記念物)
items.subcategory: 村史跡名勝天然記念物
items.location: 野田村（明内地区・根井地区）
items.description: 東北・新潟に生息する蝶。絶滅危惧II類。

en.description_en: This is a village-designated historic site, scenic beauty and natural monument, the Korean hairstreak butterfly. It is designated by Noda Village and was designated on 19 February 1988. It is located in the Myonai and Nei districts of Noda Village.

items.name: カワシンジュガイ
items.category: 記念物(史跡・名勝・天然記念物)
items.subcategory: 村史跡名勝天然記念物
items.description: 淡水二枚貝。安家川に国内最大級のコロニー。絶滅危惧II類。

en.description_en: This is a village-designated historic site, scenic beauty and natural monument, the freshwater pearl mussel. It is designated by Noda Village and was designated on 28 April 2011. It is found in the Akka River, Noda Village.

items.name: 米田浜津波堆積物地層
items.category: 記念物(史跡・名勝・天然記念物)
items.subcategory: 村史跡名勝天然記念物
items.location: 野田村 十府ヶ浦海岸南端部
items.description: 東日本大震災・貞観津波など過去の津波痕跡が残る地層。

en.name_en: Tsunami Deposit Strata at Yoneta Beach
en.description_en: This is a village-designated historic site, scenic beauty and natural monument, a stratum of tsunami deposits. It is designated by Noda Village and was designated on 23 March 2022. It is located at the southern end of Tofugaura Coast, Noda Village.
